name: SourceDown

releases.author: 0libote
releases.description:
- Improve setup handling for Python and MarkItDown
- Better file type detection and parsing
- Add note name chooser to conversion 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/0libote/SourceDown/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: 0libote
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bump esbuild from 0.25.12 to 0.28.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/0libote/SourceDown/pull/1
* Bump @types/node from 24.13.2 to 26.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/0libote/SourceDown/pull/2
* Bump typescript from 5.9.3 to 6.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/0libote/SourceDown/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/0libote/SourceDown/compare/1.0.2...1.1.0
